name: x-reader
description: Read public X posts and users through a local X API MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read X posts and profiles through the X API.
interface.longDescription: X Reader exposes a small, read-only X API toolset to Codex through a local MCP server. It is intended for source-backed reading of posts, quoted posts, users, recent search, and API usage without scraping browser pages.
defaultPrompt: Read this X post and summarize it.
Search recent X posts for this term.
